body_txt: An element that appears at the conclusion of every episode , chapter, or Story Arc . It can be dialogue, narration , or Paratext . Either way, it informs the audience that the episode/arc is over, without resorting to a generic " The End " or " To Be Continued ..." title card. For some viewers, On the Next and Closing Credits tend to function like this (even though that's probably not the intent of the creators). Oh, Cisco! is the variation that ends every ep with a joke, which may lead to everybody laughing . May include a catchphrase . A Sub-Trope to Once per Episode and Super-Trope to So Once Again, the Day Is Saved . Shows, especially aimed at young children, often end with a Wrap-Up Song . See also Signing-Off Catchphrase .
